final_prompt.prompt:
Create an e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a feminine skincare brand.

Style/medium: needs a clean, bright, airy, feminine aesthetic with floral accents — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be hero section layout with left column (text + CTAs), center (model with product), right column (product display + stat cards), bottom benefit cards row
Subject: must include a young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum, with purple flowers as accents
Scene/backdrop: needs a soft, airy studio setting — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: must be soft lighting with a bright, airy atmosphere
Color palette: must be soft pink and white dominant with purple flower accents — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "LUMEA BEAUTY" (logo), navigation links: "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", CTA button "今すぐ試す", headline "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", subheadline "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", feature badges "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", bullet points "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", CTA buttons "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", trust badges "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", stat cards "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", benefit cards "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must preserve all Japanese text verbatim, must include 5 navigation links, 3 feature badges (pill-shaped), 3 bullet points (pink checkmarks), 2 CTA buttons, 3 stat cards (floating white rounded rectangles with gold accents), 3 bottom benefit cards (horizontal white rounded rectangles with icons), model holding dropper bottle with packaging box visible
Avoid:
